description: Encourages employers to hire new employees by reimbursing the employer’s share of EPF. Aims to boost employment generation.

scheme_name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment in a financial year to every household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work. Focuses on rural employment.
Provides a platform for job seekers and employers to connect. Offers career counseling and vocational guidance services.
Provides financial assistance to startups for proof of concept, prototype development, product trials, and market entry. Fosters entrepreneurship.
A credit-linked subsidy program for setting up new micro-enterprises in the non-farm sector. Aims to generate self-employment opportunities.
Promotes a culture of innovation and entrepreneurship across the country. Supports innovators and provides platforms for new ideas.
Provides skill training to Indian youth to make them employable. Offers short-term training, recognition of prior learning, and special projects.

scheme_name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
description: Aims to transform rural poor youth into an economically independent and globally relevant workforce. Provides skill training and placement.
Promotes apprenticeship training in the country. Provides financial support to employers for engaging apprentices.
An umbrella initiative to train over 40 crore people in India in different skills by 2022. Focuses on vocational training and certification.
Provides vocational skills to non-literates, neo-literates, and persons with rudimentary education. Focuses on rural and urban poor.

scheme_name: STRIVE (Skills Strengthening for Industrial Value Enhancement)
description: Aims to improve the quality and market relevance of vocational training. Supports ITIs and apprenticeships.
Provides income support to all eligible farmer families across the country. Direct benefit transfer of Rs. 6,000 per year.
Provides insurance coverage and financial support to farmers in the event of failure of any of the notified crops. Protects against crop loss.
Provides adequate and timely credit support to farmers for their cultivation needs. Offers short-term loans at low interest rates.
Aims to increase production of rice, wheat, pulses, coarse cereals, and commercial crops. Promotes sustainable agriculture practices.
Promotes organic farming through a cluster approach. Provides financial assistance for organic certification and marketing.
Provides medium to long term debt financing for investment in viable projects for post-harvest management infrastructure. Supports farmers and agri-entrepreneurs.
Aims to expand cultivated area under assured irrigation, improve on-farm water use efficiency. Focuses on 'Per Drop More Crop'.
A component of PMKSY, focusing on creating new water sources and repairing existing ones. Ensures water availability for every farm.
Provides financial assistance to States for the completion of ongoing major/medium irrigation projects. Aims to bridge the gap between irrigation potential created and utilized.

scheme_name: Command Area Development and Water Management (CADWM)
description: Aims to improve water use efficiency and agricultural productivity in irrigated commands. Promotes participatory irrigation management.
A campaign for water conservation and water security. Focuses on rainwater harvesting, renovation of traditional water bodies, and afforestation.
Provides financial assistance to states for promoting micro-irrigation. Encourages adoption of drip and sprinkler irrigation systems.

scheme_name: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY)
description: Provides a health cover of Rs. 5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization. Benefits over 10 crore poor and vulnerable families.
Aims to achieve universal access to equitable, affordable and quality healthcare services. Strengthens public health systems.
Entitles all pregnant women delivering in public health institutions to absolutely free and no expense delivery. Reduces maternal and infant mortality.
Aims to screen children from birth to 18 years for 4 Ds - Defects at birth, Deficiencies, Diseases, and Developmental delays. Provides early intervention services.
Provides quality medicines at affordable prices to the masses. Operates Jan Aushadhi Kendras selling generic medicines.
Aims to achieve universal sanitation coverage and eliminate open defecation. Promotes cleanliness and hygiene for better public health.
Provides a guaranteed pension to subscribers after retirement. Open to all citizens in the age group of 18-40 years.
A voluntary and contributory pension scheme for unorganized workers. Provides a minimum assured pension of Rs 3000 per month after attaining 60 years.
A government-sponsored pension scheme for all citizens of India. Provides old age income security.

scheme_name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
description: Provides financial assistance to elderly persons living below the poverty line. Offers a monthly pension to eligible beneficiaries.
A pension scheme for senior citizens providing an assured return on their investment. Offers regular pension payments.
Provides pension benefits to employees covered under the Employees’ Provident Funds and Miscellaneous Provisions Act. Ensures social security.
Aims to address the declining Child Sex Ratio and promote education for girls. Focuses on awareness and improving efficiency of welfare services.
Provides maternity benefit to pregnant women and lactating mothers for the first living child. Offers partial compensation for wage loss.
A small deposit scheme for a girl child. Encourages parents to build a fund for their daughter’s future education and marriage expenses.
Aims to safeguard the health of women and children by providing clean cooking fuel (LPG). Reduces health hazards from traditional cooking fuels.
Empowers rural women through community participation. Provides skill development, employment, digital literacy, and health & nutrition services.
Provides support to women affected by violence, in private and public spaces, within the family, community and at the workplace. Offers integrated services.

scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
description: Provides life insurance cover of Rs. 2 lakhs for a premium of Rs. 436 per annum. Available to people in the age group of 18 to 50 years.
Provides accidental death and disability cover of Rs. 2 lakhs for a premium of Rs. 20 per annum. Available to people in the age group of 18 to 70 years.
A social security organization providing provident fund, pension, and insurance benefits to organized sector employees. Ensures financial security.
Provides health insurance coverage to BPL families. Offers cashless hospitalization benefits.

scheme_name: Building and Other Construction Workers (Regulation of Employment and Conditions of Service) Act
description: Aims to regulate the employment and conditions of service of building and other construction workers. Provides for their safety, health, and welfare.
Aims to support traditional artisans and craftspeople. Provides financial assistance, skill training, and modern tools.
Provides financial aid and technical support to farmer for sustainable farming practices. Includes subsidies for inputs and modern equipment.
Focuses on enhancing skills of unemployed youth in emerging sectors. Offers certified courses and industry linkages for better employment.
